Records.description: One-loop massless pentagon with three adjacent massive external legs ($p_1^2=m_1^2, p_2^2=m_2^2, p_3^2=m_3^2$) and two massless legs ($p_4^2=p_5^2=0$), defined in Eq. (4.1)-(4.2) with five inverse propagators $D_1..D_5$. Depends on eight dimensionful kinematic variables $\{s_{12},s_{23},s_{34},s_{45},s_{15},m_1^2,m_2^2,m_3^2\}$. IBP reduction via LiteRed yields 19 canonical UT master integrals (8 bubbles, 5 triangles, 5 boxes, 1 pentagon) normalised by leading singularities involving seven non-simultaneously-rationalisable square roots $\Delta_1..\Delta_7$. The $\varepsilon$-factorised differential equation has a 57-letter alphabet. The paper uses piecewise rationalisations along different segments of the integration path to express all canonical MIs in multiple polylogarithms up to transcendental weight 4 (pentagon at weight 4, sub-sectors up to weight 3), with results provided in the ancillary files.
Records.familyName: 3-mass hard one-loop pentagon (three adjacent massive legs)
Records.location: Section 4, Eq. (4.1)-(4.2); Fig. 1 (pentagon4.png); master integrals Eq. (4.3)-(4.6); alphabet Eq. (4.10)-(4.13); square roots Eq. (4.7)
